Home Biotechnology & Bioinformatics Conferences, Workshops and  Webinars Conferences, Workshops and Webinars CESTRD : ConferencesWorkshop/Training programs/Webinars/Seminars International Conferences: 3rd International Conference on Biotechnology & Bioinformatics (ICBAB-2026): 27-30 May, 2026. An International Conference on Recent Developments on Interfaces of Chemistry, Biology and Material Sciences towards Health and Environment: 8th -10th October 2024 International Conference on Biotechnology and Bioinformatics (ICBAB-2) July 11-13, 2023 - Report ICBAB-2023: 11-13 July 2023 DST and DBT Sponsored Third National Workshop on Statistical Techniques on Biological and Medical Sciences (STBMS) June 17-23, 2022 A Virtual International Conference on Technologies for Environmental Sustainability and Smart Agriculture: 18th and 19th September 2020 -Flyer - Schedule - News Clipping - Abstract Book International Conference ICBAB: 01 - 03 August 2019 Events of National Significance : World Environment Day Celebration on 5th June 2026 National Conferences and Symposiums: Report of 4th National Science Day Symposium (NSDS) - 2025 3rd National Science Day Symposium (NSDS) - 2024 National Science Day Symposium (NSDS-22): 28.02.2022 Virtual symposium entitled ‘National Science Day Symposium (NSDS-22)’ at Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, in association with Himachal Pradesh Council for Science Technology and Environment (HIMCOSTE), Government of Himachal Pradesh India on 28th Feb 2022. National Mathematics Day (NMD-2021): 22.12.2021 Virtual symposium entitled ‘National Mathematics Day (NMD-2021)’ at Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, in association with Himachal Pradesh Council for Science Technology and Environment (HIMCOSTE), Government of Himachal Pradesh India on 22th Dec 2021. Faculty Development Program: One-week Faculty Development Program on Teaching and Research Practices from 05-10th June 2023. College Rampur, Shimla - 26 October, 2024 Training held at CSIR-IHBT on Laboratory Animal Handling from 12-16th March 2024 Joint workshop by Department of BT and BI at Khalsa College, Patiala on 27th Feburary2024 Joint Workshop organized by the Department of BT and BI at RKMV, Shimla on 20th February 2024 Workshop organized by Department of BT and BI at St. Bede's Shimla on 7th December 2023 Report of One day Workshop on Chemistry Innovations Seven days DST STUTI ICT workshop on "A hands-on Training Program on Approaches for Screening and Characterization of Pre-clinical Drug Candidates", Dec 8-14, 2022 Five Days Hands-on "Next generation sequencing data analysis" (20-24, March 2023) Science competition organized on Birth Centenary of Dr. Har Gobind Khorana on 8th August 2022. Senior School, Burmana, Bilaspur, H.P.: 08 April, 2019 Workshop cum Exposure visit to Department of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics JUIT by Govt. College Sanjauli : 15th December, 2018 Workshop with farmers at Kullu - 7th May 2018 Expert Talk: Report on Expert Lecture by Prof Peter Hore on 13th Nov.2025 Dr. Shamshair Singh from Advent Informatics Pvt. Ltd., Pune at JUIT on Oct 09, 2025. Mr. Surya Uday, Head of Business Development & Operations (Shimla) for Minchy’s at JUIT on 29th January 2025. Webinars Webinar on 'Career and job opportunities for Microbiology graduates' on 18th July 2023 Webinar on 'Career Prospects in Biotechnology' on 05th July 2023 Webinar on 'Trends and Prospects of Plant Biotechnology' on 19th June 2023 Webinar on 'Genomics in human health and medicine' by Prof. Jata Shankar on 16th May 2023 Prof. Sudhir Kumar delivered an invited WebTalk to B.Sc. final year students of RKMV, Shimla on the topic "Career Opportunities for Graduates in Life-Sciences" on 11th June 2021. Prof. Sudhir Kumar delivered a webinar on Teaching and Learning for school and college faculty of Himachal and other states on 16th January, 2021. A webinar "Biogas From Food Waste: Himachal Pradesh Tackles the Looming Energy Challenge" A webinar was delivered for school, college and Universities faculties on Teaching and Learning by Prof. Sudhir Kumar 17 October, 2020. 75 participants of Himachal and other states attended this webinar in online mode.
